summary: Grouped buttons for related actions (orientation + shared variant/size).
properties: Visual style applied to member buttons.
Renders onto child via Radix Slot.
usageDo: Keep related actions in one group so spacing and focus order stay predictable.
Use `orientation="vertical"` only when horizontal space is constrained.
Rely on member `Button` instances from `↳ Buttons` so paint updates propagate.
Expose at most one primary `default` button per group.
usageDont: Do not mix unrelated actions into one group — split into separate groups.
Do not detach member buttons from the `Button` ComponentSet.
Do not override member sizing with ad-hoc frames — use the `size` prop.
Do not nest another full `ButtonGroup` inside a single group cell.
